description: Bridge ask.llm events into the configured S0 LLM provider.
entry_script:
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
last=$(sz bus subscribe llm-provider-bridge-entry 'ask.llm' | jq -c 'last // empty')
[ -z "$last" ] && exit 0
prompt=$(echo "$last" | jq -r '.payload.prompt')
resp=$(sz llm invoke --prompt "$prompt" --max-tokens 200)
text=$(echo "$resp" | jq -r '.text // empty')
payload=$(jq -nc --arg text "$text" '{text:$text}')
sz bus emit llm.invoked "$payload" --module "${SZ_MODULE_ID:-llm-provider-bridge}" >/dev/null
notes: Bridges to S0's own llm interface.
